jp.title: 龍が如く３外伝 Dark Ties』がセールに初登場！ 『ソニックレーシング クロスワールド』も注目の「セガ GWセール」開催中！｜セガ SEGA

jp.title: トランプ氏、イスラエルとレバノンの停戦の3週間延長を発表 イランとの合意は「急がない」
jp.description: アメリカのトランプ大統領は23日、同国が仲介したイスラエルとレバノンの停戦を3週間延長すると発表した。一方、イランをめぐっては、合意を「急ぐつもりはない」と述べた。BBCとの電話取材では、イランとの戦争にイギリスが加わっていないことをあらためて批判した。

jp.title: 『ぽこ あ ポケモン』ファミマからフラッペやメタモンのわらび餅が発売。対象商品購入でアクキープレゼントや抽選でトートバッグなどが当たるキャンペーンも開催
jp.description: 2026年4月28日（火）より、全国のファミリーマートにて『ぽこ あ ポケモン』とのコラボキャンペーンが開催。メタモンとピカチュウをパッケージにデザインしたポケモンフラッペなどが発売されるほか、対象商品購入でオリジナルアクリルキーホルダーがもらえるキャンペーンなども開催。

world.title: Zimbabwe: 'What Office Does He Hold?' - Chivayo's ZITF Appearance Alongside Mnangagwa, Boko Sparks Outrage
world.description: The appearance of controversial tenderpreneur Wicknell Chivayo at the Zimbabwe International Trade Fair (ZITF) alongside President Emmerson Mnangagwa and visiting Botswana leader Duma Boko has stirred unease among Zimbabweans online.

world.title: Batenga Nakisozi: Uganda National Rowing head coach attains International Certification
world.description: The Uganda national rowing head coach Batenga Nakisozi has completed the International Coaching Enrichment Certificate Program (ICECP).

world.title: PH, Indonesia reaffirm strategic ties at ministerial meeting
world.description: MANILA, Philippines — The Philippines and Indonesia reaffirmed their longstanding partnership and expanded areas of cooperation during the 8th Ministerial Meeting of the Philippines-Indonesia Joint Commission for Bilateral Cooperation (JCBC), officials said Friday.

world.title: Grudge, turf war behind Bangsar shooting incident, says CID director
world.description: KUALA LUMPUR: An old grudge and a turf war between organised crime groups are believed to be the motives behind a shooting outside an entertainment outlet along Jalan Telawi in Bangsar recently.

world.title: MOONTON Games' MythPalz arrives in soft launch on Android in select regions, helping players connect, improve, and rank up
world.description: MythPalz, a new social gaming companion from Vizta Games, is now available in soft launch on Android in select regions.

world.title: Weak outlook, ‘challenging’ environment weigh on sentiment as IT stocks bleed post Q4 earnings
world.description: IT stocks decline: On Friday, April 24, the NIFTY IT index tumbled as much as 1,252.2 points, or 4.15%, to hit the low of 28,872.10 against the previous close of 30,124.30 levels.

world.title: Respect Oburu, Atandi tells Linda Mwananchi leaders ahead of Kisumu rally
world.description: Atandi warned Linda Mwananchi leaders against issuing inflammatory statements during their visit.

world.title: Man who died after being hit by bus at Dublin Airport named
world.description: Fleming was struck by a bus on Corballis Road shortly after midnight on Thursday and was pronounced dead at the scene.

world.title: Chevron Championship: Nelly Korda takes lead as England's Mimi Rhodes impresses
world.description: American Nelly Korda takes a two shot lead at the Chevron Championship after the first round, with England's Mimi Rhodes lying fours shots off the top on her tournament debut.

world.title: Iran, US-Israel war LIVE updates: Expensive petrol is price for nuclear-free Iran, says Trump – ‘No rush on Iran deal’
world.description: Iran, US-Israel war LIVE updates: Trump ruled out using nuclear weapons against Iran, saying they should never be used, but declined to give a timeline for ending the war. He compared the conflict to long US wars in Vietnam and Iraq, while tensions rose in the Strait of Hormuz. Brent crude climbed to $106.50 a barrel as markets reacted to escalating regional risks and uncertainty over peace efforts.
